metadata.description: Autonomous cloud security posture-sweep agents for Tenable Cloud Security — MCP edition and API-token (GraphQL) edition. Four checks: root MFA, third-party sensitive access, public exposure, exposed secrets.

plugins.name: cloud-risk-triage-agent
plugins.description: MCP edition. Runs four posture checks — AWS root users without MFA, third-party identities with sensitive-data access, publicly exposed resources, and exposed secrets (each with a network-endpoint flag) — and writes a SOC-ready report. Requires the Tenable Cloud Security (tcs) MCP connector.

plugins.name: cloud-risk-triage-agent-api
plugins.description: API-token edition (no MCP). Uses the Tenable Cloud Security public GraphQL API with a Bearer token to run the same four posture checks, mapped to Findings, and write a SOC-ready report.
